items.title: Barclays Lowers Salesforce (CRM) Price Target Ahead of Q2 Earnings Print
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the AI Stocks Analysts Are Watching Closely. On August 18, Barclays analyst Raimo Lenschow lowered the price target on the stock to $316.00 (from $347.00) while maintaining an Overweight rating. According to the firm, Salesforce’s Q2 off-cycle software earnings will be another test to see if the sector can find […]

items.title: Is This The End Of The Software Era? Rethinking IGV And XSW In An AI-Driven World
